tags: Please place the product against a white background. This is an image of a silicone product shaped like a capsule (featuring a split-color design—one yellow section and one white section—while the soft silicone itself remains a single, unified piece). Please transform it into a high-quality anime-style illustration that includes the clothing worn with the product, while capturing the soft, glossy texture of the silicone. Use soft airbrush shading and skin-tone rendering techniques to create a refined, fleshy, and buttery-smooth visual effect; do not add sweat or other liquids to the surface, and avoid harsh outlines or flat blocks of color. Emphasize the moist sheen and subsurface scattering to convey a realistic, soft tactile quality. Please straighten the alignment of the internal channel, but ensure the complex internal structure and details are fully preserved—do not flatten them out.
